clo-Sports Teams

Badminton

Our University’s Men’s and Women’s Teams hold tryouts in September in order to expand their rosters and to include new students to the team. Our team continues its activities and participates in competitions until the end of the year with the squad formed as a result of the auditions.

Our teams are coached by Orkun Oktay.

Our University’s Folk Dance team holds auditions in September in order to expand their roster and to include new students to the team. Our team continues its activities until the end of the year with the staff formed as a result of the auditions and participates in competitions.

Orkun Oktay is the responsible advisor of our teams.

Sailing

Founded in 2013, Kadir Has University Sailing Club’s most important mission is to bring sea lovers together and to keep the maritime culture alive in the atmosphere of our university on the shores of the Golden Horn. Whether you want to become a professional sailor, join a racing team or learn how to sail, you can benefit from our advantageous trainings given by our expert instructors or just participate in our social events.
